subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above the attributes of all peoples, befitteth and beseemeth the Lord of Eternity, Who through His pure bounty and generosity hath brought existence out of nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از اوصاف امم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که محض فضل و جود عدم را هستی
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @power of love, @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
